description.default: /subscriptions/ [subscription id] /resourceGroups/ [resource group name] /providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/ [vault name] /secrets/ [secret name] This is the key/token necessary to make Plaid API calls. This is provided by Plaid, and can be rotated in the Plaid developer portal.

label.description: /subscriptions/ [subscription id] /resourceGroups/ [resource group name] /providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/ [vault name] /secrets/ [secret name] This is the key/token necessary to make Plaid API calls. This is provided by Plaid, and can be rotated in the Plaid developer portal.
